transformation.title: Organizational Culture Transformation
transformation.challenge: After rapid growth, the company struggled with silos, poor communication, and declining engagement.
transformation.solution: 18-month culture transformation program including diagnosis, leadership workshops, and ambassador programs.
transformation.testimonial: The program transformed our organization. Today we have a shared culture we can be proud of.

leadership.title: Leadership Development Program
leadership.challenge: Lack of prepared candidates for management positions, low effectiveness of first-line managers.
leadership.solution: 12-month development program for 40 managers including training, coaching, and implementation projects.
leadership.testimonial: Our managers are now true leaders, not just supervisors. It shows in the results.

coaching.title: Executive Coaching for Leadership Team
coaching.challenge: Young leadership team facing challenges of rapid scaling and building a mature organization.
coaching.solution: 6-month coaching program for 5 leadership team members plus team sessions.
coaching.testimonial: Coaching helped us understand that effective leadership is not just vision, but daily behaviors.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions. Didn't find your answer? Contact us.
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions. Didn't find your answer? Contact us.

items.question: What does a typical collaboration project look like?
items.answer: Every project starts with a Discovery phase where we get to know your organization and goals. Then we move through design, implementation, and consolidation of changes. A typical project lasts 3 to 18 months, depending on scope.

items.question: Do you work with small companies?
items.answer: Yes, we work with both large corporations and smaller companies from around 50 employees. We adjust the scope and intensity of collaboration to the client's needs and capabilities.

items.question: How much do your services cost?
items.answer: Prices depend on project scope and client needs. Coaching sessions start from 1500 PLN, and larger projects are priced individually. The first consultation is always free.

items.question: Do you offer results guarantees?
items.answer: We believe in our competencies and methods. We define clear KPIs at the start of every project and monitor them regularly. In some projects, we offer a success fee model.

items.question: How quickly can results be seen?
items.answer: First changes are often visible within 4-6 weeks. Full effects of development programs are measurable after 6-12 months from the start.

items.question: Do you conduct online sessions?
items.answer: Yes, we work both in-person and online. Many of our clients prefer a hybrid model - key workshops in-person, coaching sessions online.

offerings.title: Proven
